queryFromTablesDescription: Build queries and save them as charts.
queryUsingSqlRunnerDescription: Access your database to run ad-hoc queries.
dashboardDescription: Arrange multiple charts into a single view.
spaceDescription: Organize your saved charts and dashboards.
contactSupportDescription: Drop us a message and we’ll get back to you asap!
viewDocsDescription: Learn how to deploy, use, contribute to Lightdash.
joinSlackCommunityDescription: Get advice share best practices with other users.
feedbackOnLightdashDescription: Submit a feature request or bug report to improve Lightdash.
reportIssueToSupport: Report an issue to Lightdash Support
reportIssueToSupportDescription: Share a detailed issue report with Lightdash Support
